mapper.select: SELECT ei.elder_id, ei.elder_name, ei.gender, ei.age, ei.id_card, ei.birth_date, ei.phone, CONCAT(bi.room_number, '-', bi.bed_number) as bed_info, ei.status as check_in_status, ei.care_level, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(oi.total_amount) FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.elder_id = ei.elder_id AND oi.item_type = 'service_fee' AND o.order_status = '1'), 0 ) as service_balance, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(oi.total_amount) FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.elder_id = ei.elder_id AND oi.item_type = 'deposit' AND o.order_status = '1'), 0 ) as deposit_balance, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(oi.total_amount) FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.elder_id = ei.elder_id AND oi.item_type = 'member_fee' AND o.order_status = '1'), 0 ) as member_balance, ba.check_in_date, ba.due_date, ei.emergency_contact, ei.address, ba.monthly_fee, ei.emergency_phone, ei.health_status, ei.special_needs, ei.remark, ei.create_time, ei.update_time, bi.institution_id, pi.institution_name FROM elder_info ei LEFT JOIN bed_allocation ba ON ei.elder_id = ba.elder_id AND (ba.allocation_status = '1' OR ba.allocation_status = '0') LEFT JOIN bed_info bi ON ba.bed_id = bi.bed_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON bi.institution_id = pi.institution_id WHERE ei.elder_id = #{elderId}

SELECT order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, order_type as orderType, elder_id as elderId, institution_id as institutionId, order_amount as orderAmount, original_amount as originalAmount, discount_amount as discountAmount, paid_amount as paidAmount, order_status as orderStatus, payment_method as paymentMethod, payment_time as paymentTime, order_date as orderDate, service_start_date as serviceStartDate, service_end_date as serviceEndDate, billing_cycle as billingCycle, month_count as monthCount, remark, create_time as createTime, create_by as createBy FROM order_info WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT payment_id as paymentId, payment_no as paymentNo, order_id as orderId, elder_id as elderId, institution_id as institutionId, payment_amount as paymentAmount, payment_method as paymentMethod, payment_status as paymentStatus, payment_time as paymentTime, transaction_id as transactionId, operator, remark, create_time as createTime, create_by as createBy FROM payment_record WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY payment_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ei.elder_id) as totalResidents, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN oi.item_type = 'service_fee' AND o.order_status = '1' THEN oi.total_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) as totalServiceBalance, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN oi.item_type = 'deposit' AND o.order_status = '1' THEN oi.total_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) as totalDepositBalance, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN oi.item_type = 'member_fee' AND o.order_status = '1' THEN oi.total_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) as totalMemberBalance FROM elder_info ei LEFT JOIN order_info o ON ei.elder_id = o.elder_id LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE ei.status IN ('0', '1', '3')
